en_title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Last Ronin Is in Development at PlatinumGames
cn_title: 白金工作室操刀《忍者神龟：最后的浪人》
subtitle: 忍者神龟的黑暗终章
opus_summary: 派拉蒙成立游戏工作室，首款大作与白金工作室合作推出《忍者神龟：最后的浪人》AAA动作冒险游戏。基于热门漫画，讲述最后一只神龟的复仇之旅，白金工作室融合日式动作与西方叙事，对标《尼尔：机械纪元》。

paragraphs.en: Paramount has made a significant move in the world of video games, and announced its first major project, Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Last Ronin from Bayonetta developer PlatinumGames.
paragraphs.cn: 派拉蒙在游戏界迈出了重要一步，宣布了其首个重大项目——由《猎天使魔女》开发商白金工作室打造的《忍者神龟：最后的浪人》。

paragraphs.en: The newly set up Paramount Games Studio includes all Paramount and Skydance gaming studios, including Skydance Interactive and Skydance New Media, in a major push into the triple-A space. As well as the Turtles game from Platinum, Paramount Games Studio is now publishing the recently delayed Avatar Legends: The Fighting Game .
paragraphs.cn: 新成立的派拉蒙游戏工作室整合了派拉蒙和Skydance旗下所有游戏工作室，包括Skydance Interactive和Skydance New Media，大举进军AAA领域。除了白金工作室的忍者神龟游戏外，派拉蒙游戏工作室还将发行近期跳票的《降世神通：传奇之战》。

paragraphs.en: But let’s start with Turtles. Revealed during the Summer Game Fest showcase, Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Last Ronin is described as a “AAA action-adventure game” that is, as you’d expect from the name, based on the hugely popular comic book series. The Last Ronin follows the last surviving Ninja Turtle as he embarks on a desperate mission for vengeance. It’s early days, but expect a release on consoles and PC.
paragraphs.cn: 不过我们先说忍者神龟。在夏日游戏节展示会上亮相的《忍者神龟：最后的浪人》被描述为一款「AAA动作冒险游戏」，顾名思义，它基于大受欢迎的漫画系列。故事讲述最后一只幸存的忍者神龟踏上绝望的复仇之旅。目前尚处早期阶段，但预计将登陆主机和PC。

paragraphs.en: And if you’re slightly confused by this announcement given a Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Last Ronin game was already announced as in development at Embracer-owned studio Black Forest Games, that project is no more, Paramount confirmed to IGN. The Last Ronin was in development at Black Forest and publisher THQ Nordic, but at some point before Skydance merged with Paramount in August last year development had stopped. Paramount Games decided to continue development and opted to go with Platinum.
paragraphs.cn: 如果你对这个公告感到困惑——因为此前已有一款《忍者神龟：最后的浪人》游戏宣布由Embracer旗下的Black Forest Games开发——派拉蒙向IGN确认，那个项目已经终止。《最后的浪人》曾在Black Forest和发行商THQ Nordic手中开发，但在去年8月Skydance与派拉蒙合并之前的某个时间点，开发已停止。派拉蒙游戏决定继续开发，并选择了白金工作室。

paragraphs.en: Ahead of today's announcement, IGN interviewed Shawn Kittelsen, senior vice president, head of creative and production at Paramount Games Studio, to find out as much as possible not only about the Turtles game, but what Paramount is trying to achieve here. He compared the ambition of the Turtles game to Nier: Automata , which Platinum also worked on, and said fans of Paramount’s fast vault of franchises can start to get excited for more big video games based upon them.
paragraphs.cn: 在今天的公告之前，IGN采访了派拉蒙游戏工作室高级副总裁兼创意与制作主管Shawn Kittelsen，不仅了解了这款忍者神龟游戏，还了解了派拉蒙的雄心。他将这款忍者神龟游戏的野心比作白金工作室也参与过的《尼尔：机械纪元》，并表示派拉蒙旗下众多IP的粉丝可以开始期待更多基于这些IP的大型游戏了。

paragraphs.en: IGN: Why is the formation of Paramount Games Studio important for our readers? What changes as a result of what you're doing here that they'll actually feel the effect of?
paragraphs.cn: IGN：派拉蒙游戏工作室的成立对读者来说为什么重要？你们所做的这一切会带来哪些实际变化，让读者能感受到影响？

paragraphs.en: Shawn Kittelsen: If you are a fan of Star Trek or Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles or SpongeBob or any of the franchises that live at Paramount, then this is a sea change in how Paramount approaches games, where previously games were strictly something that was licensed out and Paramount didn't have an investment in. Now Paramount is treating games as a content pillar alongside film and TV, and we're investing in games and we're publishing games. We're taking a stronger hand in the quality and creative control of those games. So we are elevating games in a big way. And that means if you've been a fan of these franchises and you're like, where are the triple-A TMNT games? Where's the love for Avatar: The Last Airbender? We're going to bring those games that you've been waiting for to the platforms that you play on.
paragraphs.cn: Shawn Kittelsen：如果你是《星际迷航》《忍者神龟》《海绵宝宝》或派拉蒙旗下任何IP的粉丝，那么派拉蒙对待游戏的方式将发生巨变。以前游戏严格来说是授权出去的，派拉蒙没有投资。现在派拉蒙将游戏视为与电影和电视并列的内容支柱，我们正在投资游戏并发行游戏。我们在游戏质量和创意控制上掌握了更强的主导权。所以我们正在大力提升游戏的地位。这意味着，如果你一直是这些IP的粉丝，并且心想：AAA级《忍者神龟》游戏在哪？《降世神通》的爱在哪里？我们将把你们期待已久的游戏带到你们玩的平台上。

paragraphs.en: IGN: Do you now have a significant first-party development resource you can draw upon to actually build games yourselves? Turtles is with Platinum, which is an external developer. Will you be developing games yourself?
paragraphs.cn: IGN：你们现在是否拥有足够强大的第一方开发资源来自己制作游戏？忍者神龟是与外部开发商白金工作室合作的。你们会自己开发游戏吗？

paragraphs.en: Shawn Kittelsen: Yes. So we have Skydance game studios: Skydance New Media, which was co-founded by Amy Hennig, that's working on Marvel 1943, and then Skydance Interactive, which is the team that had worked in VR on titles like The Walking Dead: Saints & Sinners and Behemoth. Both of those teams are in the future going to be publishing games under the Paramount banner. We're going to be making games for the franchises that we own. We're going to be making games for original IP. We believe that games is a place where IP and new franchises can originate. So we want to take some calculated bets there.
paragraphs.cn: Shawn Kittelsen：是的。我们有Skydance游戏工作室：Skydance New Media由Amy Hennig联合创立，正在开发《漫威1943》；Skydance Interactive则是在VR领域制作过《行尸走肉：圣徒与罪人》和《Behemoth》的团队。这两个团队未来都将在派拉蒙旗下发行游戏。我们将为我们拥有的IP制作游戏，也将为原创IP制作游戏。我们相信游戏是IP和新系列诞生的地方。所以我们想在那里进行一些经过计算的冒险。

paragraphs.en: And then there's going to be emerging IP as we develop new franchises within Paramount. Those might also start in games as they make their way across all media. So the plan is to do a mix of first-party development, third-party development or co-development, and then still some licensing where it makes sense. If there is a franchise or a genre or a platform that we're not prepared to invest in and really give our best attention, then that's a great opportunity to find the right partner and license with them.
paragraphs.cn: 此外，随着我们在派拉蒙内部开发新系列，还会有新兴IP出现。这些IP也可能从游戏起步，然后扩展到所有媒体。所以计划是混合进行第一方开发、第三方开发或合作开发，并在合适的情况下保留一些授权。如果某个IP、类型或平台我们尚未准备好投入并给予最佳关注，那么这就是寻找合适合作伙伴并授权给他们的好机会。

paragraphs.en: But because we're also publishing and making our own games, we can be a bit more selective about where we license to make sure that we're curating the maximum quality for each IP. We don't want to just shotgun things out there and flood the market. We really want to make sure that when people see a Turtles game or a SpongeBob game or whatever, that they see that and they associate quality with it. And that means that over time we will want to grow our first-party development. But I think if there's anything that the 2020s has taught us, it's don't get over your skis by being too acquisitive in this industry and just building up a giant war chest of studios without being prepared to manage them effectively, to guide them towards the right projects and make sure that you can bring those projects to market. So we're taking the mixed approach and then building very, very conscientiously.
paragraphs.cn: 但因为我们也在发行和制作自己的游戏，我们可以更谨慎地选择授权对象，以确保为每个IP策划最高质量。我们不想像散弹枪一样到处乱发，充斥市场。我们真正想要的是，当人们看到一款忍者神龟游戏或海绵宝宝游戏时，他们能将其与品质联系起来。这意味着随着时间的推移，我们希望扩大第一方开发能力。但我认为，如果说2020年代教会了我们什么，那就是不要在这个行业过于贪婪，不要在没有准备好有效管理、引导正确项目并确保项目上市的情况下，就盲目收购一大堆工作室。所以我们采取混合方式，并且非常、非常审慎地建设。

paragraphs.en: IGN: Let's talk about Turtles. Platinum has a fantastic reputation for action games. It does feel like the perfect match, really. So it'd be great to get some insight into how this project began and why you thought Platinum was the right fit.
paragraphs.cn: IGN：我们来谈谈忍者神龟。白金工作室在动作游戏方面享有盛誉。这确实感觉是天作之合。所以很想了解一下这个项目是如何开始的，以及为什么你们认为白金工作室是合适的选择。

paragraphs.en: Shawn Kittelsen: From the jump, the idea of PlatinumGames and The Last Ronin seemed like peanut butter and chocolate. They went together very, very well. It was the kind of no-brainer pitch in terms of, could this work? Absolutely. When we started Paramount Games at the end of last year, building out the division and the team and looking at the slate, there wasn't a Last Ronin game in development at the time. There were some previous partnerships that had gone away. So we were very, very excited to say, "Well, let's get going on this. Let's make that the first thing that we focus on." And Platinum had some really awesome creatives who were excited about The Last Ronin and had a pitch. And when we saw their pitch, it was about so much more than what we expected.
paragraphs.cn: Shawn Kittelsen：从一开始，白金工作室和《最后的浪人》这个想法就像花生酱和巧克力一样。它们非常非常搭配。这是一个无需多想的提案：这能行吗？绝对能行。去年年底我们启动派拉蒙游戏时，正在组建部门和团队，审视项目清单，当时并没有《最后的浪人》游戏在开发中。之前的一些合作已经终止了。所以我们非常兴奋地说：「好吧，我们开始吧。让它成为我们关注的第一件事。」白金工作室有一些非常棒的创意人员，他们对《最后的浪人》充满热情，并提出了一个方案。当我们看到他们的方案时，它远远超出了我们的预期。

paragraphs.en: I expected to hear a lot about combat and action and we did, but we also heard a lot about the heart of this story and what The Last Ronin means to Turtles fans who grew up with TMNT and now can look back on their lives and see that things have changed, and they're more complicated, and they live in a different world, and they want the next generation to be able to enjoy the things that we all enjoyed when we were younger. So when they came in and they're like, "It's about the seasons of life and how we all love this thing and how it changes as we grow older but we still love it, but it's not the same," that hit different for me because okay, these guys not only understand the action component very well and obviously have those chops, but they understand this story and the work that Kevin Eastman [co-creator of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles] and Tom Waltz, the Escorza Brothers and Peter Laird and everyone else who contributed to The Last Ronin, they will honor the source material with an adaptation that really gets into the heart of the characters and the themes.
paragraphs.cn: 我本以为会听到很多关于战斗和动作的内容，确实听到了，但我们也听到了很多关于这个故事的核心，以及《最后的浪人》对那些从小看《忍者神龟》长大的粉丝意味着什么——他们现在回顾自己的生活，发现一切都变了，变得更复杂了，他们生活在一个不同的世界，他们希望下一代也能享受我们年轻时喜欢的东西。所以当他们过来说：「这是关于人生的季节，关于我们如何热爱这个东西，以及它如何随着我们长大而改变，但我们仍然爱它，只是它不一样了，」这让我感触很深，因为好吧，这些人不仅非常了解动作部分，显然也有那个功底，而且他们理解这个故事，理解凯文·伊斯特曼（《忍者神龟》联合创作者）、汤姆·沃尔兹、埃斯科尔萨兄弟、彼得·莱尔德以及其他所有为《最后的浪人》做出贡献的人的作品，他们会通过一部真正深入角色和主题核心的改编作品来尊重原作。

paragraphs.en: So that's the first big AAA project that we greenlit and that we've been working on. I think it represents everything that we want Paramount Games to be: the right fit between the team and the IP. They're fans of it. We don't want people who are non-fans being forced into making a game just for a paycheck. We want people who would bleed for these characters with or without the job. Like, they would be out there making fanfic. So we've got all the right ingredients to say, "Okay, this is exactly what we want to make as a company and this is a great game to represent the best of what we can do with our characters and with our future."
paragraphs.cn: 所以这是我们批准并一直在开发的第一个大型AAA项目。我认为它代表了我们对派拉蒙游戏的所有期望：团队与IP之间的完美契合。他们是粉丝。我们不希望非粉丝为了薪水而被迫制作游戏。我们希望那些无论有没有这份工作都会为这些角色付出一切的人。比如，他们会在外面写同人小说。所以我们拥有所有正确的要素，可以说：「好的，这正是我们作为一家公司想要制作的，这是一款伟大的游戏，代表了我们在角色和未来方面能做到的最好水平。」

paragraphs.en: And then I'm personally invested in The Last Ronin because I'm working on the story for it. I haven't written a full game since Mortal Kombat 11 and the Aftermath content. I was a narrative lead on MK11 and Injustice II. So I have actually written for Turtles before, because we had the Turtles in Injustice 2 as guest characters. So it's nice to come back to the Turtles.
paragraphs.cn: 我个人也投入到了《最后的浪人》中，因为我正在为它编写故事。自从《真人快打11》和「余波」内容之后，我就没再写过完整的游戏。我曾是《真人快打11》和《不义联盟2》的叙事主管。实际上我以前也为忍者神龟写过故事，因为我们在《不义联盟2》中加入了忍者神龟作为客串角色。所以能回到忍者神龟的世界真好。

paragraphs.en: But Yohei Shimbori, who's the director at PlatinumGames working on The Last Ronin, he also comes from fighting games. He was a producer on Tekken 8. He was on the Dead or Alive series for a number of years. And when we met, we got along. It was very much peanut butter and chocolate. And when we talked about what his ambitions for the story for the game were, one of the things that he talked about was how he really wanted to marry Japanese action with Western storytelling, and make an adaptation that really challenged what Platinum has done in the past with stories, and try to meet the bar set by things like Nier: Automata, when you think of the best stories in PlatinumGames.
paragraphs.cn: 而负责《最后的浪人》的白金工作室总监新堀洋平，他也来自格斗游戏领域。他曾是《铁拳8》的制作人，并在《死或生》系列工作了多年。我们见面时，很合得来，就像花生酱和巧克力一样。当我们谈到他对游戏故事的抱负时，他提到的一点是，他非常想将日式动作与西方叙事结合起来，制作一部真正挑战白金工作室以往故事水平的改编作品，并努力达到《尼尔：机械纪元》等作品设定的标准——当你想到白金工作室最好的故事时。

paragraphs.en: And we talked about, "Hey, well, we'll get some Western writers." And he said, "Well, I really love Injustice 2 and MK11 and your work. We could work on this together." If you throw that out there to me and it's like, "Oh, you mean I don't have to... Oh, I could do that?" That was an irresistible opportunity. So I've got a narrative director, Mike Rogers, on our team who we're working with as well on the story. Mike just worked on the Invincible VS fighting game with Robert Kirkman. I guess we're a bunch of old fighting game hands who are coming together to make the ultimate Turtles action adventure now.
paragraphs.cn: 我们讨论过：「嘿，我们会找一些西方编剧。」他说：「嗯，我真的很喜欢《不义联盟2》和《真人快打11》以及你的作品。我们可以一起合作。」如果你对我抛出这个，我会想：「哦，你的意思是我不用……哦，我可以做吗？」那是一个无法抗拒的机会。所以我们团队里有一位叙事总监Mike Rogers，他也和我们一起参与故事创作。Mike刚刚与罗伯特·柯克曼合作了《无敌少侠：对决》格斗游戏。我想我们是一群老格斗游戏玩家，现在聚在一起制作终极忍者神龟动作冒险游戏。

paragraphs.en: Shawn Kittelsen: It's early on, but the terms of the deal are fully executed. We're already multiple milestones deep and getting into prototyping and building our way to all of the pieces that we need to go scale full production. So it's early days.
paragraphs.cn: Shawn Kittelsen：目前还处于早期阶段，但协议条款已完全执行。我们已经完成了多个里程碑，正在进入原型制作阶段，并逐步构建全面生产所需的所有要素。所以还处于早期阶段。

paragraphs.en: IGN: You mentioned Nier: Automata as a point of comparison. That's a masterpiece in many people's eyes. You’re shooting high!
paragraphs.cn: IGN：你提到了《尼尔：机械纪元》作为比较对象。在很多人眼中那是一部杰作。你们的目标很高啊！

paragraphs.en: Shawn Kittelsen: That's the trick. I started my career working on the Arkham games at DC Comics. That's how I got connected to NetherRealm and WB Games in the first place. I think we don't want to treat any of these as just opportunities to bring something that people know to games. It's cultural stewardship for us. It's, what's the best way to bring this to an audience? I think The Last Ronin comics are some of the best books of the last five, 10 years, but even so there's only an audience that's so big for comics. And when we bring the story to games, I hope that it drives a lot more people back to the comics and go back and rediscover that story in the comics, because we're going to be pushing towards such a big global audience. So we're very excited about what we can do with this one.
paragraphs.cn: Shawn Kittelsen：这就是诀窍。我的职业生涯始于DC漫画公司，参与过《阿卡姆》系列游戏。这也是我最初与NetherRealm和华纳游戏建立联系的原因。我认为我们不想把这些仅仅视为将人们熟悉的东西带到游戏中的机会。对我们来说，这是文化管理。问题是：将这个故事带给观众的最佳方式是什么？我认为《最后的浪人》漫画是过去五到十年里最好的作品之一，但即便如此，漫画的受众规模也是有限的。当我们把这个故事带到游戏中时，我希望它能驱使更多人回到漫画中，重新发现漫画里的故事，因为我们将面向一个巨大的全球受众。所以我们对此非常兴奋。

paragraphs.en: And like I said, it's a passion project. I've already got enough of other jobs, so it takes a lot to convince me and my wife that I should be spending nights and weekends working on a game personally!
paragraphs.cn: 就像我说的，这是一个充满激情的项目。我已经有足够多的其他工作了，所以需要很大的说服力才能让我和我的妻子同意我亲自在晚上和周末花时间做游戏！

paragraphs.en: Wesley is Director, News at IGN. Find him on Twitter at @wyp100. You can reach Wesley at wesley_yinpoole@ign.com or confidentially at wyp100@proton.me.
paragraphs.cn: Wesley是IGN新闻总监。在Twitter上关注他@wyp100。可通过wesley_yinpoole@ign.com联系Wesley，或通过wyp100@proton.me进行保密联系。

audit_issues.detail: opus_summary must be 70-80 non-space characters, got 97

audit_failure_reason: [summary_length] opus_summary must be 70-80 non-space characters, got 97
